6. Ambulance service. (See Pub 100-02, Medicare Benefit Policy Manual, Chapter 
10, Ambulance Services) 

7. Hepatitis B Vaccine. Hepatitis B vaccine and its administration are covered under 
Part B for patients who are at high or intermediate risk of contracting hepatitis B. 
High risk groups currently identified include: end-stage renal disease (ESRD) 
patients, hemophiliacs who receive factor VIII or IX concentrates, clients of
